query: Can you critique this dashboard and tell me which chart is misleading?
I uploaded a CSV of defect rates; help me choose a plot and make it publication-ready.
This bar chart starts at 92—how bad is that?
Turn these forecast intervals into a clear figure with uncertainty bands.
Make a better visual argument from these numbers for my report.
Use Tufte principles to redesign this chart.
My boss wants a map of raw case counts by county—is that okay?
Generate a quick SVG chart from this CSV.
Can you check whether these chart label colors have enough contrast?
Make me a decorative hero image for a website landing page.
Clean this CSV and upload rows to Postgres.
Write a Python function to parse dates in this file.
Design a logo for my materials science group.
Summarize this paper in bullet points.
Fix the formulas in my Excel budget spreadsheet.
Make my slide deck prettier but don't change any charts.
